g.text: created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW()
WITH (fillfactor = 90) → 10% page space reserved for HOT
TOAST: original_url > ~2KB stored in TOAST table (avg 100
Sequence cache = 100 → reduces contention at high create QPS

g.text: Column: id | Implicit from PRIMARY KEY constraint

text.font-family: Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: Used for Base62 short code generation
Column: short_code | Implicit from UNIQUE constraint
Primary redirect lookup index in v1
No separate redirect index in v1
uq_short_code is sufficient at projected scale
Add a covering hot-path index only in v2
Repeated URLs still create distinct short codes
Expired links are filtered in application logic
Batch cleanup starts in v2 if needed
uq_short_code → short_code UNIQUE across ALL rows
